steps.text:
Planet California, orbit.
A corporate star-cruiser.
An escape pod bay.

steps.speaker: Dad (Intercom)
steps.text: I just don't understand the whole nonbinary thing. Why can't you pick a tangible demographic to market yourself to?

steps.speaker: Dad (Intercom)
steps.text: If you'd just join The Vanguard, you could be financially successful and oppress people with a dental plan!

*SQUELCH*

Lucky slaps a pseudopod over the intercom,
cutting off the speech mid-sentence.

Lucky hits a massive, unnecessarily red
EJECT button.

The pod fires out of the ship.
It breaks apart on hitting Earth's atmosphere.

Lucky free-falls, flattening out
like a cartoon flying squirrel.
Slime sunglasses form on their face.

Minneapolis, Minnesota.
A gorgeous purple-orange twilight.
A neon pink-and-green slime contrail
arcs across the sky.
